title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, rebuilt the insurance industry from the ground up as outsiders, raising $108M in Series A funding. The company emphasizes pursuing the most ambitious version of an idea and has built a multi-year moat through regulatory expertise and relentless execution, projecting several hundred million in ARR.
